name: DBase IRC Network
description: DBase is an IRC network founded in 2008, originally established as X-Serv before being rebranded to DBase Network. We are a technology and music-oriented community focused on ethical hacking, programming, system administration, and open-source development. Our network provides a platform for developers, security researchers, and technology enthusiasts to connect, share knowledge, and collaborate on projects. IRC Database - Comprehensive statistics and information about IRC networks, servers, and channels. Browse IRC networks, find IRC servers, search IRC channels, and view real-time IRC statistics.
